mapper.sql: id, type_id, type_name, creator_id, creator_name, department_id, department_name, title, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer, analysis, tags, image_url, video_url, difficulty, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from question order by create_time desc
select from question where type_id = #{typeId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where creator_id = #{creatorId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where department_id = #{departmentId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where type_id = #{typeId} and department_id = #{departmentId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where type_id = #{typeId} and status = 1 order by rand() limit #{count}
mapper.insert: insert into question(type_id, type_name, creator_id, creator_name, department_id, department_name, title, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer, analysis, tags, image_url, video_url, difficulty, status) values(#{typeId}, #{typeName}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{title}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{tags}, #{imageUrl}, #{videoUrl}, #{difficulty}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from question where id in
#{id}
